problem id: 4ada9150
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHL(4)

examples:
  10001111 -> 11111110
  01000100 -> 01010001
  10111100 -> 11110010
  10000001 -> 00010110
  01011100 -> 11110001
  10110110 -> 11111010
  10000010 -> 00101010
  00100101 -> 11010100
  11000011 -> 00111111
  00100111 -> 11111100

query: 11000110
predicted answer: 01111011
